html:
Exclusive to:  

OnOffLow fuel

“Can be turned on and off. While fueled and on, if a fire appears within its range, it will fling a snowball at it to put it out.”

-

The Ice Flingomatic is a craftable Structure that requires 2 Gears, 15 Ice, and 2 Electrical Doodads to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

The Ice Flingomatic can be turned on and off by the player. When turned on, the Ice Flingomatic will automatically launch snowballs to extinguish any smoldering objects or Fires, within its range of 3.75 tiles. This also includes Campfires, Fire Pits, Night Lights, and Endothermic Fires. It will not target players holding Torches (or Willow's Lighter).

While turned off, it is in "Emergency Mode". In this state, the Ice Flingomatic will not save plants or crops from withering or automatically put out all fires within its range, but if there are 5 "structures" on fire, or a recently burnt "structure" within 3.75 tiles, the machine will sound an alarm, lighting the light bulb on its top and playing a tone. If another "structure" is burnt within 15 seconds of the alarm sounding, the Ice Flingomatic will turn itself on and attempt to control the fire automatically. "Structures" includes the normal buildings like chest, but also others like planted flower, trees, saplings. The emergency mode switch on will only happen if the Flingomatic is fueled and is useful for protecting against a total fire destruction, at the cost of taking some fire damage.

After the fire is controlled, if no more fires are detected for 25 seconds, the Ice Flingomatic will turn itself off again. When automatically responding to an emergency, an Ice Flingomatic cannot be manually turned off once it has been activated.

A working Ice Flingomatic can emit enough light to ward off Charlie.

The Ice Flingomatic has a limited fuel tank, indicated by a red gauge on the front of the unit. A full tank will last 5 days and can be refueled with any fuel substances, Logs (9%) or Rot (3%), as well as Nitre (19%), Glommer's Goop (37.5%). As long as the Ice Flingomatic is turned on, it will consume fuel over time. Extinguishing fires and reviving withered plants does not consume additional fuel.

The Ice Flingomatic will target withered Berry Bushes, Grass Tufts, and Saplings, allowing them to be harvested normally throughout Summer.

The snowballs provide an effect in a 1 tile radius. Each snowball will cool thermal stone by 5 degree, down to -20 degree.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal Amazing Snowball Juggler was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from March 14, 2019 to April 2019. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
Woven - Elegant
Year of the Pig King Collection
Fling-o-Tron 4000
Fires never had a chance.
See ingame
Loyal
Side Show Collection
Amazing Snowball Juggler
Look and be amazed by the incredible automatic snowball juggling machine!
See ingame

Tips

  • Since structures can catch on fire during Summer, a Flingomatic can safeguard one's most important structures (e.g. Chests). However careful planning is required so that the Fire Pits and Endothermic Fire Pits are not inside the Flingomatic's area.
  • The Ice Flingomatic can lob snowballs over all types of Walls.
  • The Ice Flingomatic will instantly freeze Mobs that are hit by the Snowballs. Players can exploit this to their advantage and stunlock mobs.
  • Activating the Ice Flingomatic before leaving the area in the Summer will prevent fires from starting or spreading upon return.
  • The Ice Flingomatic's range is a 7.5 tile diameter. This applies in both the horizontal and vertical direction.
  • When placing Plants around a base, one should position them so that an Ice Flingomatic can function as a sprinkler during the Summer, maintaining them as renewable resources and protecting them from spontaneous combustion.
  • Despite the high cost of construction and operation, the machine cannot put out extensive fires by itself, requiring more than one.

Bugs

  • When placed on a moving Boat, the Ice Flingomatic takes the Boat's velocity into account when aiming its snowball, even if the boat is not really moving. For example, if the Boat is stuck near land but the Mast is still deployed, the Ice Flingomatic will behave as if the boat is in motion. As a result, its snowballs will consistently miss their intended targets.

Gallery

  • Approximate total snowball splash area
  • A turned off Ice Flingomatic that has used some fuel.
  • An Ice Flingomatic throwing snowballs at two burning Drying Racks.
  • The Flingomatic being used to freeze mobs near a fire.
  • A Flingomatic in Emergency Mode detecting and subsequently automatically attempting to extinguish a group of burning Saplings in DST. Note the red light when responding to the emergency instead of the normal green one.


Craftable ItemsStructures

Exclusive to:
Ice Flingomatic
"Saves plants, puts out fires, fueled by flame."
Object Info
Perk
Extinguishes fires
Revives withering plants
5 Days.

Miscellaneous
"firesuppressor"
OnOffLow fuel
“Fling on!”
–Wilson
“I wish you'd shut your lid and stop putting out fires.”
–Willow
“I can throw better.”
–Wolfgang
“I don't know why you bother. We're all going to burn.”
–Wendy
“FRIEND IS WHIRRING”
–WX-78
“Pitch that ice!”
–Wickerbottom
“Save the trees!”
–Woodie
“Begone, fire!”
–Maxwell
“Catapult engaged för battle!”
–Wigfrid
“This would come in handy in a snowball fight.”
–Webber
“Make it snow!”
–Warly
“Good machine”
–Wormwood
“Witness the efficiency of the future!”
–Winona
“It is ready to fling at a moment's notice.”
–Wortox
“Good machine!”
–Wurt
“That should keep us from setting the camp on fire... hopefully.”
–Walter
“It's a good thing we prepared for just such an eventuality.”
–Wanda
“All quiet on the flinging front.”
–Wilson
“And stay off!”
–Willow
“Machine know Wolfgang is stronger.”
–Wolfgang
“Quiet as a corpse.”
–Wendy
“QUIET FRIEND”
–WX-78
“Nothing to see here.”
–Wickerbottom
“Lazy thing.”
–Woodie
“Quiet before the storm.”
–Maxwell
“Time tö rest, flinging warriör.”
–Wigfrid
“It's off.”
–Webber
“He's sleeping.”
–Warly
“Keep fire away”
–Wormwood
“We should mass produce these things.”
–Winona
“Dead to the world.”
–Wortox
“It sleeping.”
–Wurt
“It's conserving its energy.”
–Walter
“Ready to fling at a moment's notice.”
–Wanda
“The fuel tank is getting a bit low.”
–Wilson
“Almost out.”
–Willow
“Are you hungry, machine?”
–Wolfgang
“It's running on fumes.”
–Wendy
“FRIEND NEEDS FOOD BADLY”
–WX-78
“Fuel's getting low.”
–Wickerbottom
“It craves wood.”
–Woodie
“Not much fuel left.”
–Maxwell
“The catapult gröws weak and tired.”
–Wigfrid
“Running low on fuel.”
–Webber
“Shall I fuel it up?”
–Warly
“Needs food”
–Wormwood
“Needs a top up.”
–Winona
“It hungers for souls! Or fuel.”
–Wortox
“It getting hungry.”
–Wurt
“We'd better give it some more fuel.”
–Walter
“It's starting to wind down.”
–Wanda
“Can be turned on and off. While fueled and on, if a fire appears within its range, it will fling a snowball at it to put it out.”
-

The Ice Flingomatic can be turned on and off by the player. While turned off, it is in "Emergency Mode". In this state, the Ice Flingomatic will not save plants or crops from withering or automatically put out all fires within its range, but if there are 5 "structures" on fire, or a recently burnt "structure" within 3.75 tiles, the machine will sound an alarm, lighting the light bulb on its top and playing a tone. The emergency mode switch on will only happen if the Flingomatic is fueled and is useful for protecting against a total fire destruction, at the cost of taking some fire damage. == {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * Since structures can catch on fire during Summer, a Flingomatic can safeguard one's most important structures (e.g. Chests). However careful planning is required so that the Fire Pits and [[Endothermic Fire Pit]]s are not inside the Flingomatic's area. * The Ice Flingomatic can lob snowballs over all types of [[Wall]]s. * The Ice Flingomatic will instantly freeze [[Mobs]] that are hit by the Snowballs. Players can exploit this to their advantage and stunlock mobs. * Activating the Ice Flingomatic before leaving the area in the Summer will prevent fires from starting or spreading upon return. * The Ice Flingomatic's range is a 7.5 tile diameter. This applies in both the horizontal and vertical direction. * When placing [[Plants#Collectible Plants|Plants]] around a base, one should position them so that an Ice Flingomatic can function as a sprinkler during the Summer, maintaining them as renewable resources and protecting them from spontaneous combustion. * Despite the high cost of construction and operation, the machine cannot put out extensive fires by itself, requiring more than one. == {{Pic32|Mosquito}} Bugs == * When placed on a moving [[Boat]], the Ice Flingomatic takes the Boat's velocity into account when aiming its snowball, even if the boat is not really moving. For example, if the Boat is stuck near land but the [[Mast]] is still deployed, the Ice Flingomatic will behave as if the boat is in motion.
